mapper.select:
SELECT a.meter_num AS meterNum, a.valve_status AS valveStatus, a.setting_status AS settingStatus, a.actual_status AS actualStatus, a.in_temperature AS inTemp, a.out_temperature AS outTemp, a.voltage AS voltage, a.valve_time AS valveTime, a.reporting_interval AS reportInterval, a.interval_unit AS reportingUnit, a.valid_time AS validTime, a.signal_strength AS csq, b.org_name AS orgName, b.building_name AS buildingName, b.unit_code AS unitCode, b.room_num AS roomNum FROM pr_heat_valve_archive a INNER JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id WHERE a.is_changed = 0 AND a.meter_arc_code <> '04310101' AND a.valve_status IS NOT NULL AND a.meter_num IN
#{meterNum}

SELECT a.concentrator_code AS concentratorCode, COUNT(*) AS deviceCount, MAX(a.dtu_num) AS dtuNum, MAX(a.valve_time) AS lastValveTime, CASE WHEN MAX(a.valve_time) IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(a.valve_time), NOW()) <= #{onlineThresholdMinutes} THEN true ELSE false END AS online, ROUND(AVG(a.signal_strength), 1) AS avgSignalStrength, MAX(a.dtu_status) AS dtuStatus, SUM(CASE WHEN a.valve_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.valve_time, NOW()) <= #{onlineThresholdMinutes} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS onlineCount FROM pr_heat_valve_archive a WHERE a.concentrator_code IS NOT NULL AND a.concentrator_code != ''
AND (a.concentrator_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR a.dtu_num LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
GROUP BY a.concentrator_code ORDER BY online DESC, deviceCount DESC
